description_long: This is a modern single-story bungalow surrounded by lush landscaping, including palm trees and hedges. The structure features a flat roof with a green rooftop garden, and large glass windows and sliding doors that provide ample natural light. The exterior walls are finished in a combination of light-colored plaster and wood paneling, giving it a contemporary aesthetic. The front entrance is set back from a wide driveway, with a small porch area and landscaped planters. The layout is open, with visible interior divisions for living spaces, bedrooms, and utility areas. The property is enclosed by greenery, offering privacy and a seamless blend with the outdoor environment.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat green roof, large glass windows, wood paneling, and lush landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, porch, and prominent palm trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the wood-paneled facade, side garden, and the depth of the driveway.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full length of the bungalow, green rooftop, and privacy hedges.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with visible driveway, side entrance, and additional landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding doors
